testcase.name: test_create_inspection_template
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_report_templates.py:107: in test_create_inspection_template assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":"Partner not found"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_inspection_template_no_partner_field_in_modal
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_report_templates.py:135: in test_inspection_template_no_partner_field_in_modal assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":"Partner not found"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_report_template

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'Premium Report' == 'Premium'
- Premium + Premium Report

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_report_templates.py:236: in test_create_report_template assert created["style_info"]["name"] == "Premium" E AssertionError: assert 'Premium Report' == 'Premium' E E - Premium E + Premium Report

testcase.name: test_get_single_report_template

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'partner_name' in {'created_at': '2026-02-19T11:13:06.034086+00:00', 'created_by': 'b4a37860-e6bc-47be-961e-a674425708ca', 'created_by_name': 'Vikram Singh', 'description': 'Technical report with all inspection data and metrics', ...}

testcase.name: test_all_apis_accessible
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_report_templates.py:388: in test_all_apis_accessible assert response.status_code == 200, f"{name} API failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Offers API failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
